mapper.sql: id, name, description, type, clazz, method, parameterTypes, columns, empPower, depPower, state, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo, createBy, createTime, updateBy, updateTime, formHtml, script
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into t_data_operation (name, description, type, clazz, method, parameterTypes, columns, empPower, depPower, state, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo, createBy, createTime, updateBy, updateTime, formHtml, script ) values (#{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{clazz,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{method,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parameterTypes,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{columns,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{empPower,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{depPower,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{state,jdbcType=BIT}, #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{formHtml,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{script,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} )

SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()

name,

mapper.update:
update t_data_operation
name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
type = #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER},
clazz = #{clazz,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
method = #{method,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
parameterTypes = #{parameterTypes,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
columns = #{columns,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
empPower = #{empPower,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
depPower = #{depPower,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
state = #{state,jdbcType=BIT},
effectiveFrom = #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
effectiveTo = #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
formHtml = #{formHtml,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
script = #{script,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update t_data_operation set name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, type = #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER}, clazz = #{clazz,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, method = #{method,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, parameterTypes = #{parameterTypes,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, columns = #{columns,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, empPower = #{empPower,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, depPower = #{depPower,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, state = #{state,jdbcType=BIT}, effectiveFrom = #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, effectiveTo = #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, formHtml = #{formHtml,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, script = #{script,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select:
select * from t_data_operation
id = #{id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
name = #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
description = #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
type = #{type, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
clazz = #{clazz, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
method = #{method, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
parameterTypes = #{parameterTypes, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
columns = #{columns, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
empPower = #{empPower, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depPower = #{depPower, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
state = #{state, jdbcType=BIT} AND
effectiveFrom = #{effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
effectiveTo = #{effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
createBy = #{createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
createTime = #{createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
updateBy = #{updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
updateTime = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
formHtml = #{formHtml, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} AND
script = #{script, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} AND

select count(1) from t_data_operation
id = #{id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
name = #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
description = #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
type = #{type, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
clazz = #{clazz, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
method = #{method, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
parameterTypes = #{parameterTypes, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
columns = #{columns, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
empPower = #{empPower, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depPower = #{depPower, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
state = #{state, jdbcType=BIT} AND
effectiveFrom = #{effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
effectiveTo = #{effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
createBy = #{createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
createTime = #{createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
updateBy = #{updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
updateTime = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
formHtml = #{formHtml, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} AND
script = #{script, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} AND

select * from t_data_operation
id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
name = #{model.name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
description = #{model.description, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
type = #{model.type, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
clazz = #{model.clazz, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
method = #{model.method, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
parameterTypes = #{model.parameterTypes, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
columns = #{model.columns, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
FIND_IN_SET(#{model.empPower, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, empPower) AND
FIND_IN_SET(#{model.empPower, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, depPower) AND
state = #{model.state, jdbcType=BIT} AND
effectiveFrom = #{model.effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
effectiveTo = #{model.effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
createBy = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
createTime = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
updateBy = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
updateTime = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
formHtml = #{model.formHtml, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} AND
script = #{model.script, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} AND
( name like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or description like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or clazz like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or method like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or parameterTypes like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or columns like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or empPower like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or depPower like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or formHtml like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or script like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
order by ${orderBy}
order by id desc
limit #{start}, #{pageSize}

select count(1) from t_data_operation
id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
name = #{model.name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
description = #{model.description, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
type = #{model.type, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
clazz = #{model.clazz, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
method = #{model.method, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
parameterTypes = #{model.parameterTypes, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
columns = #{model.columns, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
FIND_IN_SET(#{model.empPower, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, empPower) AND
FIND_IN_SET(#{model.empPower, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, depPower) AND
state = #{model.state, jdbcType=BIT} AND
effectiveFrom = #{model.effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
effectiveTo = #{model.effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
createBy = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
createTime = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
updateBy = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
updateTime = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
formHtml = #{model.formHtml, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} AND
script = #{model.script, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} AND
( name like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or description like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or clazz like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or method like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or parameterTypes like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or columns like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or empPower like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or depPower like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or formHtml like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or script like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )

select * from t_data_operation
id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
name = #{model.name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
description = #{model.description, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
type = #{model.type, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
clazz = #{model.clazz, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
method = #{model.method, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
parameterTypes = #{model.parameterTypes, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
FIND_IN_SET(empPower, #{model.empPower, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AND
FIND_IN_SET(depPower, #{model.depPower, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AND
state = #{model.state, jdbcType=BIT} AND
effectiveFrom = #{model.effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
effectiveTo = #{model.effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
createBy = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
createTime = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
updateBy = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
updateTime = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
formHtml = #{model.formHtml, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} AND
( name like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or description like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or clazz like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or method like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or parameterTypes like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or empPower like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or depPower like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or formHtml like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
order by ${orderBy}
order by id desc
limit #{start}, #{pageSize}

select count(1) from t_data_operation
id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
name = #{model.name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
description = #{model.description, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
type = #{model.type, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
clazz = #{model.clazz, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
method = #{model.method, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
parameterTypes = #{model.parameterTypes, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
empPower = #{model.empPower, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depPower = #{model.depPower, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
state = #{model.state, jdbcType=BIT} AND
effectiveFrom = #{model.effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
effectiveTo = #{model.effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
createBy = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
createTime = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
updateBy = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
updateTime = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
formHtml = #{model.formHtml, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} AND
( name like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or description like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or clazz like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or method like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or parameterTypes like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or empPower like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or depPower like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or formHtml like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
select count(1) from t_data_operation where name = #{name}
select * from t_data_operation where name = #{name} limit 1

select count(1) from (${customField}) t
`${key}` = #{value} AND
`${item.data}` like BINARY CONCAT("%", #{fuzzyStr}, "%")
